forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 41. North wind around 3 mph.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 61. Northeast wind 3 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
As the night lingers softly over Boston, the clear skies wrap the city in a tranquil embrace, with temperatures gently descending to around 41 degrees. A gentle north wind weaves through the streets, whispering promises of a sun-drenched morning ahead. As dawn breaks, an inviting sunlight will sweep across the landscape, gifting onlookers with a warm and cheerful canvas, a welcome departure from winter’s chill. Under the northeast winds, playful gusts will accompany the high of approximately 61 degrees, perfect for the kind of day that encourages leisurely strolls along the waterfront or a quiet moment in one of the city’s many charming parks.

Dressing for this comfortable day might call for a light jacket or a cozy sweater to ward off the cool breeze in the early hours. As the day unfurls, layers can be shed to embrace the warmth of the sun. It is an opportune time to explore the scenic beauty of the Arboretum or perhaps to indulge in a quiet afternoon at a sidewalk café, where one can sip coffee and blend into the rhythm of a city coming alive. Whether it is a casual walk among flowering trees or simply surrendering to the weekday calm, Boston today offers a serene escape, beckoning all to pause and relish in its understated charm.
